arts.ttl: Saturday's FA Cup preview: Liverpool, Man City and Chelsea in action
arts.sum: Brentford head coach Thomas Frank hopes to soon see the best of Rico Henry again as the defender prepares to make his long-awaited return from injury in Saturday's FA Cup third round tie against Plymouth . "Rico will be involved in the game tomorrow - not only will he be involved, he will start," Frank told a press conference.

arts.sum: Manchester City welcome neighbouring Salford City to the Etihad in the third round of the FA Cup this weekend.
